prices.source_block:
Admission prices:
Effective Wednesday, Jan. 14, 2026, the following admission prices will be in effect at the Aviation Museum of N.H:
• Adults 13 and above, $15
• Youth age 6 to 12, $7.50
• Children 5 and under, FREE!
• Seniors (65+), veterans, active military, $7.50
• Aviation Museum members, FREE!

reservation.source_phrase: No reservations required—first come, first served.
reservation.source_block: The Aviation Museum’s B-24 ‘D-Day Flight Adventure’ simulation will operate Thursday, June 5 through Saturday, June 7 from 1 to 4 p.m. each day and is included with museum admission. No reservations required—first come, first served. Join us this week as we honor the 81st anniversary of this key turning point in World War II!

hours.source_phrase: • Wednesdays through Saturdays 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.
hours.source_block:
Hours:
The Aviation Museum of N.H. is open to the public:
• Wednesdays through Saturdays 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.
• Sundays 1 to 4 p.m.
• Other times by appointment. Call (603) 669-4820 ext. 404 to arrange for a group tour or private visit.
